feedback.name: wechat-post-sop-dogfood
feedback.description: Real-world dogfood of the 公众号发文 SOP. Confirms G4/G5/G6/G7 work end-to-end.

feedback.name: coverage-red-line
feedback.description: When a coverage gate fails on a new file, do NOT reflexively add tests just to cover the missing line or branch.

rule.name: active-skill-cli-routing
rule.description: Active-skill reads go through the CLI. Do not read the active-skill JSON file directly.

cold.name: main-branch-iteration
cold.description: For future iterations in this project, do not create worktrees by default; modify directly on the main branch.

cold.name: peaks-current-directory-scope
cold.description: peaks-loop scopes its operations to the current directory by default, not the entire filesystem.
